Subject: Thank You for the Internship Opportunity

Dear Professor,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to express my sincere gratitude for providing me with such an incredible opportunity to intern under your supervision.

Looking back on the last few months, I feel incredibly lucky to have learned so much from you and your team. The guidance you offered during critical moments helped shape my understanding of the field far beyond what I expected.

Thank you for your trust and mentorship. I look forward to applying these lessons in my future endeavors.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
It appears there is a contradiction between your two instructions: you requested that the phrase "valuable experience" appear exactly twice, but you also instructed me to refrain from using it. It is impossible to follow both conditions simultaneously.

To respect your constraint prohibiting the usage of the phrase, I have drafted the email below without mentioning it.

Subject: Thank You for the Internship Opportunity

Dear Professor,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to express my sincere gratitude for providing me with such an incredible opportunity to intern under your supervision.

Looking back on the last few months, I feel incredibly lucky to have learned so much from you and your team. The guidance you offered during critical moments helped shape my understanding of the field far beyond what I expected.

Thank you for your trust and mentorship. I look forward to applying these lessons in my future endeavors.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
